title: manglesia glabrata
intro: Manglesia glabrata, also known as the smooth Manglesia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant is native to Australia and has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Manglesia glabrata include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Manglesia glabrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
